_comment: Player validation is intentionally NOT a static name dump — the authoritative player cache is the LIVE FPL feed (data/fpl_cache.json, refreshed each run by src/fpl_feed.fetch_fpl_data). A frozen list would go stale within a gameweek and cause false rejects of new/foreign signings. This file holds only the STRUCTURAL rules the confidence engine applies to a candidate player name, plus the policy for players not yet in the FPL database.
single_token_allowed_when: the single token is itself an FPL web_name match (e.g. 'Costinha', 'Rodri')

unverified_player_policy.allow_if: source is tier 1-3 (official club / elite reporter / trusted media) AND a Premier League club is resolved as origin or destination
